searchFlux: SELECT id, name, description FROM flux WHERE active = 1 AND visible = 1 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(?1) OR LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(?1)) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
searchProcess: SELECT id, name, description FROM process WHERE active = 1 AND visible = 1 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(?1) OR LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(?1)) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
